name: Podio
description: A collaborative work platform for managing projects, CRM, and workflows with a RESTful API to automate and integrate Podio data and actions.

auth_methods.note: Documentation states Podio uses OAuth 2 (authorization code flow), supports client credentials (machine-to-machine) and accepts Bearer tokens; Podio does not use API keys for general access. Mapped 'client_credentials' to 'oauth2' and 'bearer_token' to 'token' to match allowed enum values.

credential_access.note: Developers can register an application in the developer console to obtain client_id and client_secret instantly after logging in; no mention of paid-only or partner gating.

api_surface.note: API docs describe a RESTful HTTP API covering many resource types (items, apps, tasks, users, orgs, spaces, contacts, etc.), with CRUD operations.

buildability.note: Public REST API docs plus self-serve client credentials are available; developers can register apps and use OAuth flows to obtain tokens and call endpoints.

queries: Podio API documentation developer Podio API docs site:podio.com OR site:help.podio.com "API" "developer"
